cards.name: Ace of Cups
cards.interpretation: love, new feelings, emotional awakening, creativity, spirituality, intuition

cards.name: Ⅲ The Empress, reversed
cards.interpretation: insecurity, overbearing, negligence, smothering, lack of growth, lack of progress

cards.name: ⅩⅢ Death, reversed
cards.interpretation: fear of change, repeating negative patterns, resisting change, stagnancy, decay
